method: Each data point in the live edition was checked against authoritative MLB sources (MLB Stats API / MLB.com, ESPN box scores and recaps, Baseball-Reference, and verified beat reporting).

verdict_legend.unverifiable: Could not be confirmed or refuted from available sources.

relevancy_legend.current: Timely and correct as of the edition date.
relevancy_legend.misleading: Technically stale but presented as current.

summary.headline: 20 of 21 checked claims verified accurate. No inaccuracies. One unverifiable (a pre-dawn weather forecast).

highlights.title: Looks wrong, verified right: Adolis García
highlights.detail: García is a longtime Texas Ranger, so seeing him on the Phillies injury report reads like an error. It is correct: he signed with Philadelphia for 2026 and is on the 60-day IL with a torn lat.

highlights.title: Looks wrong, verified right: Freddy Peralta
highlights.detail: Peralta pitched for Milwaukee, so listing him in a Mets series looks off. He was traded to the Mets in January 2026 and is the confirmed June 20 probable starter.

sources.label: WHBL — Phillies place LHP Kyle Backhus (elbow) on IL
ESPN — Mets acquire Freddy Peralta from Brewers

items.note: Issue number is consistent with a daily cadence since the 2026-03-28 launch, and the pre-dawn stamp matches a same-day pregame edition.
Confirmed three-game set at Citizens Bank Park; Philadelphia won Games 1-2 (7-0 on 6/15, 8-2 on 6/16).
Confirmed probables for the series finale.
94 WIP is the correct radio flagship; the TV/stream mix matches the 2026 broadcast arrangement.

items.claim: Weather: 62°, Overcast, 3 mph winds with 5 mph gusts
items.note: A 3:59 AM forecast snapshot that cannot be validated after the fact. 62° is on the cool side for a 1 PM mid-June Philadelphia game but plausible under an overcast front.
ESPN's 6/16 recap shows 40-33 after the 8-2 win.
Record and GB verified; opponent streak (L1) not independently confirmed but consistent.
Record and GB verified; opponent streak (W4) not independently confirmed but consistent.
Record, GB, and L2 streak all verified (Miami lost the first two games of this series).
Record and GB verified; opponent streak (L2) not independently confirmed but consistent.

items.claim: Kyle Backhus (LHP): left elbow inflammation, 15-day IL
items.note: Confirmed LHP on the 15-day IL with left elbow inflammation. Began a rehab assignment 6/9, so activation may be near, but the IL listing is correct pregame.

items.claim: Adolis García (RF): right latissimus dorsi tear, 60-day IL
items.note: García signed with Philadelphia for 2026 and is on the 60-day IL with a torn lat. Correct despite reading like a Rangers-era error.

items.claim: Brad Keller (RHP): right forearm tendinitis, 15-day IL
items.note: Keller confirmed on the Phillies' injured list in mid-June 2026.

items.claim: Thu, Jun 18: Sean Manaea vs NYM, 6:40 PM (NBCSP)
items.note: Mets at CBP, 6:40 PM; Sean Manaea (NYM) is the scheduled starter. Day-of-week correct.

items.claim: Sat, Jun 20: vs Freddy Peralta, 7:15 PM (FOX)
items.note: Confirmed Mets game; Peralta (acquired by the Mets in Jan 2026) is the probable, opposite Cristopher Sánchez. Time and FOX both confirmed.
Mets game; pitcher TBD is reasonable. No June 19 game is listed, which is correct — that date is an off day.
